exampleSentences: Anh ấy có một công việc phụ vào buổi tối để kiếm thêm thu nhập.
Chị thường làm thêm công việc phụ vào cuối tuần khi rảnh.
Em nghĩ các môn học phụ cũng quan trọng như môn chính.
notes:
phụ = secondary, extra, not the main thing. It describes something that supports or comes after the main one.

It usually goes after a noun to mean “side/extra/supporting.”  
Opposite: chính (main, primary) — this pair is very common.

It can also mean “supporting” in roles, like in movies or jobs.
exampleSentencesTranslated: He has a secondary job in the evening to earn extra income.
She often does secondary work on weekends when she is free.
I think secondary subjects are as important as main subjects.

example.en: I need someone to assist me.
example.vi: Tôi cần một người phụ giúp tôi.
example.es: Necesito a alguien que me ayude.

definitions.en: to assist or help someone in a task.
definitions.es: asistir o ayudar a alguien en una tarea.
definitions.vi: giúp đỡ hoặc hỗ trợ ai đó trong một nhiệm vụ.

notes_md:
**phụ** = secondary, extra, not the main thing. It describes something that supports or comes after the main one.

It usually goes after a noun to mean “side/extra/supporting.”  
Opposite: **chính** (main, primary) — this pair is very common.

It can also mean “supporting” in roles, like in movies or jobs.
